MagHolder02.title: BLAUBECK Magnetic Phone Holder for Stroller, Bike, Treadmill - MagSafe Universal Mount
MagHolder02.shortDescription: Universal magnetic phone mount for stroller, treadmill, golf push cart, Peloton, and steering wheel. MagSafe compatible with strong dual magnets.
keyFeatures: Strong Dual Magnets - Securely holds iPhone and Android phones during movement
360 Degree Adjustable Rotation - Tilt and rotate phone to any viewing angle
Universal Fit - Attaches to strollers, treadmills, bikes, golf carts, steering wheels
MagSafe Compatible - Works with MagSafe cases or included metal ring for Android
Easy No-Tool Install - Clamp design fits round bars and flat surfaces
MagHolder02.description: The BLAUBECK Magnetic Phone Holder is the universal mount built for people on the move. Strong dual magnets hold your iPhone or Android phone steady on strollers, treadmills, Peloton bikes, golf push carts, and steering wheels. The 360 degree adjustable ball joint lets you set the perfect viewing angle whether you are tracking a workout, following a recipe, or keeping the kids entertained on a walk. Works with MagSafe compatible cases out of the box, or use the included adhesive metal ring to make any phone magnetic. Simple clamp installs in seconds with no tools. Built from durable aluminum and high-strength magnets for everyday reliability.
MagHolder02.keywords: magnetic phone mount, stroller phone holder, treadmill phone mount, MagSafe bike mount, peloton phone holder, golf cart phone holder, universal phone holder, running phone mount

MagHolder04.title: BLAUBECK Thick Magnetic Phone Mount for Gym, Zinc Alloy, MagSafe and Android
MagHolder04.shortDescription: Heavy-duty magnetic phone mount with dual-sided magnets. Sticks to squat racks, weight stacks, and metal gym equipment. MagSafe and Android compatible.
keyFeatures: Dual-Sided Strong Magnets - Grips phone front while sticking to metal gym equipment

Adjustable Kickstand - Doubles as a desk stand for video calls

MagSafe and Android - MagSafe cases plus included adhesive ring for Android
MagHolder04.description: Built for the gym, tough enough for anywhere. The BLAUBECK Thick Magnetic Phone Mount uses heavy-duty dual magnets to grip your iPhone or Android phone on one side while attaching to metal equipment on the other. Record workouts, follow guided programs, or watch Netflix between sets without a flimsy clamp. The zinc alloy body is machined to feel substantial, not plasticky, and the built-in kickstand flips out so the mount doubles as a desk stand. Sticks to squat racks, cable machines, weight stacks, lockers, filing cabinets, fridges, and any metal surface. Includes a self-adhesive metal ring for Android phones and non-MagSafe cases. Thick design, not pocket-sized but built to last.
MagHolder04.keywords: magnetic phone mount, gym phone holder, squat rack phone mount, MagSafe magnetic mount, metal phone mount, workout phone holder, magnetic mount Android, strong magnetic phone stand
